requirement_topic.en: Brazil Market Access — INMETRO Mark, Importer CNPJ Registration, ANATEL Homologation and PNRS Reverse Logistics
requirement_topic.zh: 巴西市场准入——INMETRO标识、进口商CNPJ注册、ANATEL认证及PNRS逆向物流
requirement_topic.zht: 巴西市場准入——INMETRO標識、進口商CNPJ登記、ANATEL認證及PNRS逆向物流

summary.en: Non-Brazilian manufacturers placing portable lithium batteries or power banks on the Brazilian market must fulfil the following market access obligations: (1) INMETRO certification and mark — compulsory certification under Portaria INMETRO 489/2018 by an accredited OCP, with the INMETRO conformity identification mark affixed and the product registered in the INMETRO database. There is no CE mark in Brazil. (2) In-country importer / legal representative — Brazil generally requires an established importer holding a Brazilian CNPJ (and a RADAR/Siscomex import licence) to act as the responsible legal entity; the INMETRO certificate and product registration are typically held by or jointly with this importer, who is responsible before the authorities. (3) ANATEL homologation — power banks with any radiocommunication function require ANATEL homologation under Resolucao 715/2019. (4) PNRS reverse logistics (EPR) — under Lei 12.305/2010, CONAMA 401/2008 and Decreto 10.240/2020, manufacturers and importers placing batteries on the market must join or establish a reverse-logistics / take-back system with collection points and report results. Customs clearance typically occurs at ports such as Santos or Paranagua.
summary.zh: 非巴西制造商将便携式锂电池或移动电源投放巴西市场，须履行以下市场准入义务：（1）INMETRO认证及标识——依据INMETRO第489/2018号法令由认可的OCP进行强制认证，加贴INMETRO合格标识并在INMETRO数据库注册。巴西没有CE标志。（2）境内进口商/法定代表——巴西通常要求由持有巴西CNPJ（及RADAR/Siscomex进口许可）的已设立进口商作为责任法人；INMETRO证书及产品注册通常由该进口商持有或共同持有，并由其对主管机关负责。（3）ANATEL认证——含任何无线电通信功能的移动电源须依据第715/2019号决议取得ANATEL认证。（4）PNRS逆向物流（EPR）——依据第12.305/2010号法律、CONAMA第401/2008号决议及第10.240/2020号法令，投放电池的制造商和进口商须加入或建立含收集点的逆向物流/回收体系并报告结果。清关通常在桑托斯（Santos）或巴拉那瓜（Paranagua）等港口办理。
summary.zht: 非巴西製造商將便攜式鋰電池或行動電源投放巴西市場，須履行以下市場准入義務：（1）INMETRO認證及標識——依據INMETRO第489/2018號法令由認可的OCP進行強制認證，加貼INMETRO合格標識並在INMETRO數據庫登記。巴西沒有CE標誌。（2）境內進口商/法定代表——巴西通常要求由持有巴西CNPJ（及RADAR/Siscomex進口許可）的已設立進口商作為責任法人；INMETRO證書及產品登記通常由該進口商持有或共同持有，並由其對主管機關負責。（3）ANATEL認證——含任何無線電通信功能的行動電源須依據第715/2019號決議取得ANATEL認證。（4）PNRS逆向物流（EPR）——依據第12.305/2010號法律、CONAMA第401/2008號決議及第10.240/2020號法令，投放電池的製造商和進口商須加入或建立含收集點的逆向物流/回收體系並報告結果。清關通常在桑托斯（Santos）或巴拉那瓜（Paranagua）等港口辦理。

standards_or_laws: Portaria INMETRO 489/2018 — compulsory certification and INMETRO conformity mark for lithium batteries
ANATEL Resolucao 715/2019 — homologation for products with radiocommunication functions
Lei 12.305/2010 (PNRS) + CONAMA 401/2008 + Decreto 10.240/2020 — battery reverse logistics / EPR
Siscomex / RADAR import licensing — Receita Federal (importer with Brazilian CNPJ)

summary.en: China's domestic market access for lithium battery products uses a different framework: CCC (China Compulsory Certification, administered by CNCA/SAMR) is mandatory for certain rechargeable battery product categories sold domestically (e.g., mobile phone lithium batteries are CCC-listed). However, CCC certification is a Chinese domestic market requirement and is NOT recognised by Brazil; it does not substitute for INMETRO certification. Chinese manufacturers do not need to appoint a Brazilian importer or representative for domestic Chinese sales. There is no Chinese equivalent of the Brazilian per-product INMETRO registration via an in-country importer CNPJ, nor of the PNRS reverse-logistics obligation imposed on exporters. China domestically operates the Regulations on the Administration of the Recovery and Disposal of Waste Electrical and Electronic Products.
summary.zh: 中国国内锂电池产品市场准入采用不同框架：CCC（中国强制认证，由CNCA/SAMR管理）对某些在国内销售的可充电电池产品类别为强制性（如手机锂电池已列入CCC目录）。然而，CCC认证属于中国国内市场要求，不被巴西认可，不可替代INMETRO认证。中国制造商在国内销售时无需任命巴西进口商或代表。对于出口商，中国没有等同于巴西通过境内进口商CNPJ进行逐产品INMETRO注册的制度，也没有等同于PNRS逆向物流义务的制度。中国在国内实行《废弃电器电子产品回收处理管理条例》。
summary.zht: 中國國內鋰電池產品市場准入採用不同框架：CCC（中國強制認證，由CNCA/SAMR管理）對某些在國內銷售的可充電電池產品類別為強制性（如手機鋰電池已列入CCC目錄）。然而，CCC認證屬於中國國內市場要求，不被巴西認可，不可替代INMETRO認證。中國製造商在國內銷售時無需任命巴西進口商或代表。對於出口商，中國沒有等同於巴西通過境內進口商CNPJ進行逐產品INMETRO登記的制度，也沒有等同於PNRS逆向物流義務的制度。中國在國內實行《廢棄電器電子產品回收處理管理條例》。

standards_or_laws: CCC — China Compulsory Certification (CNCA/SAMR) — domestic China market access only; not recognised in Brazil
PRC Regulations on the Administration of the Recovery and Disposal of Waste Electrical and Electronic Products (2011, amended 2019) — domestic WEEE equivalent

gap.en: Chinese manufacturers exporting portable batteries to Brazil face four structural market access gaps with no Chinese domestic equivalent: (1) an in-country importer holding a Brazilian CNPJ (with Siscomex/RADAR import licensing) must be appointed as the responsible legal entity and certificate holder — a Chinese exporter cannot self-register; (2) compulsory INMETRO certification by an accredited OCP with the INMETRO conformity mark and product-database registration, in place of any CE-style self-declaration; (3) ANATEL homologation for power banks with radiocommunication functions; (4) PNRS reverse-logistics / take-back enrolment under Lei 12.305/2010 and Decreto 10.240/2020, with collection points and reporting. CCC certification (Chinese domestic) is not transferable. Total compliance cost may include OCP certification and factory-audit fees, importer/representative arrangements, ANATEL homologation fees, and reverse-logistics scheme contributions; customs clears typically at Santos or Paranagua.
gap.zh: 向巴西出口便携式电池的中国制造商面临四项在中国国内无对应制度的结构性市场准入差距：（1）须任命持有巴西CNPJ（含Siscomex/RADAR进口许可）的境内进口商作为责任法人及证书持有人——中国出口商无法自行注册；（2）由认可的OCP进行强制INMETRO认证、加贴INMETRO合格标识并完成产品数据库注册，替代任何CE式自我声明；（3）含无线电通信功能的移动电源须取得ANATEL认证；（4）依据第12.305/2010号法律及第10.240/2020号法令加入PNRS逆向物流/回收体系，含收集点及报告。CCC认证（中国国内）不可转移。合规总成本可能包括OCP认证及工厂审核费用、进口商/代表安排、ANATEL认证费及逆向物流体系分摊；清关通常在桑托斯或巴拉那瓜办理。
gap.zht: 向巴西出口便攜式電池的中國製造商面臨四項在中國國內無對應制度的結構性市場准入差距：（1）須任命持有巴西CNPJ（含Siscomex/RADAR進口許可）的境內進口商作為責任法人及證書持有人——中國出口商無法自行登記；（2）由認可的OCP進行強制INMETRO認證、加貼INMETRO合格標識並完成產品數據庫登記，替代任何CE式自我聲明；（3）含無線電通信功能的行動電源須取得ANATEL認證；（4）依據第12.305/2010號法律及第10.240/2020號法令加入PNRS逆向物流/回收體系，含收集點及報告。CCC認證（中國國內）不可轉移。合規總成本可能包括OCP認證及工廠審核費用、進口商/代表安排、ANATEL認證費及逆向物流體系分攤；清關通常在桑托斯或巴拉那瓜辦理。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory legal obligation — INMETRO compulsory certification and mark, an in-country importer with a Brazilian CNPJ, ANATEL homologation for radiocommunication functions, and PNRS reverse-logistics enrolment apply before placement on the Brazilian market; there is no CE-style self-declaration route
mandatory_status.cn: CCC certification mandatory for domestically-sold products in applicable categories; no equivalent of a Brazilian importer-CNPJ registration, INMETRO compulsory certification, ANATEL homologation, or PNRS reverse-logistics obligation required of Chinese exporters under Chinese law

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Chinese portable battery and power bank exporters must address four market access obligations before Brazilian market entry: compulsory INMETRO certification and mark under Portaria 489/2018, an in-country importer holding a Brazilian CNPJ as responsible legal entity and certificate holder, ANATEL homologation for radiocommunication functions, and PNRS reverse-logistics enrolment under Lei 12.305/2010 and Decreto 10.240/2020. Unlike the EU, there is no CE-style self-declaration and the importer cannot be a foreign manufacturer. CCC certification does not transfer to or substitute for any of these Brazilian requirements.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 中国便携式电池及移动电源出口商在进入巴西市场前，须应对四项市场准入义务：依据第489/2018号法令的强制INMETRO认证及标识、持有巴西CNPJ作为责任法人及证书持有人的境内进口商、含无线电通信功能产品的ANATEL认证，以及依据第12.305/2010号法律和第10.240/2020号法令的PNRS逆向物流加入。与欧盟不同，巴西没有CE式自我声明，进口商不能是外国制造商。CCC认证无法转移或替代上述任何巴西要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 中國便攜式電池及行動電源出口商在進入巴西市場前，須應對四項市場准入義務：依據第489/2018號法令的強制INMETRO認證及標識、持有巴西CNPJ作為責任法人及證書持有人的境內進口商、含無線電通信功能產品的ANATEL認證，以及依據第12.305/2010號法律和第10.240/2020號法令的PNRS逆向物流加入。與歐盟不同，巴西沒有CE式自我聲明，進口商不能是外國製造商。CCC認證無法轉移或替代上述任何巴西要求。

source.publisher: INMETRO — Avaliacao da Conformidade (Portaria 489/2018) / ANATEL / Receita Federal (Siscomex)
